# Kubernetes Recipes

> A curated collection of production-ready Kubernetes recipes by Luca Berton.

Total recipes: 797

## Categories

### Ai (111 recipes)

- [Agentic AI and Multi-Agent Systems on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/agentic-ai-multiagent-kubernetes/): Deploy autonomous AI agents and multi-agent orchestration on Kubernetes. LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen,

- [AI Infrastructure Cost Optimization on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/ai-infrastructure-cost-optimization-kubernetes/): Optimize AI infrastructure costs on Kubernetes. GPU sharing, spot instances, inference batching, mod
- [AI-Native Development Platforms on Kubernetes](https://kubernetes.recipes/recipes/ai/ai-native-development-kubernetes/): Build AI-native development platforms on Kubernetes. AI coding agents, automated testing, Copilot in
- ... and 106 more
